payload.label: nightstand
payload.long_description: Dark reddish-brown mahogany three-drawer nightstand with carved drawer fronts, dark metal pull handles and small bracket feet; top surface shows objects and the right side of the piece is slightly cropped — approximate distance from camera ~0.8 m.
